business_ideas.idea: Good Water - Athletic Greens for dogs, sponsor pet creators, add health benefits to dog water

Franchise model for creator agencies, transfer customer acquisition to operators
Lightweight EOS - simplified version of operating system for entrepreneurs
Luxury newsletter for ultra-high net worth (0.003%, $30M+) - Playing Field model
Mr Trademark - Stripe Atlas for trademark registration, streamline USPTO process
Luxury status software like Superhuman - apps as Veblen goods for top 1%

predictions.text: Pinks window cleaning brand will spawn 50+ similar businesses (lawn care, pest control, car wash) in 5-10 years
Gen Z unbundling religion by seeking meaning through daily content like Daily Stoic
Veeblen goods becoming more popular as status signaling shifts from price to scarcity
